evidence_snippets: A zaftig BLACK WOMAN clumsily negotiates the aisle. Stops at the first of a few empty seats left in the car.
Sara's back is to a black girl striding purposefully toward her. CHENILLE -- tall, pretty, with about a
plump ass. Squirming in too-tight gym shorts that hug the cheeks. ANGLE WIDENS to reveal a stout white girl on a balance beam. Trying to get her legs to stand up on
into her pocketbook, hands Sara her I.D. PUSH IN ON photo of obese white girl with an untamed trailer trash perm. Sara's eyes go wide.
SARA is described as Black, and the setting is predominantly Black.
